signals.text: CHURNED ACCOUNT — brand marked churn_status:true in sentiment.json. All platform metrics are zero.
Zero sessions, revenue, purchases, pdp_views, atc, checkouts across all time windows (FERMAT API token expired; prior pull confirmed all zeroes)
Last recorded call was Dec 11, 2025 (117 days ago) — no calls in 2026
No upcoming calendar events with HAVN through Jun 7, 2026 — zero meeting cadence
Zero Gmail messages found in 90 days — no email communication at all
Last Slack message from brand contact (Tom Guilbert) was Jan 6, 2026 — 90 days ago, about an A/B test split issue
CSM handoff failure: Ryan Barry left Dec 20, Isabel checked in Jan 16 with no reply, Pulkit joined Feb 24 but never posted outreach
No Granola meeting notes found for HAVN — brand not discussed in any recorded internal or external meetings
Tom Guilbert (tom@havnwear.com) last engaged on Jan 6 reporting a technical issue with incremental test setup — issue may have gone unresolved

performance.data_note: FERMAT API token expired during this refresh (3 consecutive attempts failed). Prior refresh on Apr 6 confirmed all metrics at zero across all time windows. HAVN is a churned account with no active funnel traffic.

recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.summary: Last recorded weekly sync with HAVN. Tom, Ryan, and Isabel discussed ongoing funnel performance and AI Search trial. Ryan's last day at FERMAT was Dec 20 — handoff to Mia/Isabel announced. This was the final active engagement call before the brand went silent.
next_steps: Ryan handoff to Mia/Isabel for ongoing account management

calls.analysis: HAVN had active weekly calls through December 2025 with Ryan Barry as primary CSM. Ryan departed FERMAT on Dec 20, 2025. Isabel O'Keefe (Head of AM) was introduced as interim contact on the Dec 11 call. No calls recorded in 2026 at all — 117 days of complete silence. Brand contact is Tom Guilbert (tom@havnwear.com). Glyphic returned 10 call records total (6 unique calls after deduplication, all from Oct-Dec 2025). Call_info and call_media APIs returned errors for all call IDs, so detailed transcripts/snippets are unavailable. HAVN is fully churned with no active meeting cadence.
calls.glyphic_note: Glyphic list_calls returned 10 results. get_call_info, get_call_media, and get_call_snippets all returned -32603 errors for every call_id attempted. Call metadata (titles, dates, participants, durations) sourced from list_calls response.

calendar.analysis: Google Calendar search for 'HAVN' from Mar 9 to Jun 7, 2026 returned zero events. No past or upcoming meetings scheduled. The brand has been completely dropped from the calendar since the CSM transition.

slack.analysis: HAVN Slack channel (#havn-x-fermat, C08SNU8SHB6) has been dead since January 2026. Last brand message: Tom Guilbert on Jan 6, 2026 reporting a 50/50 incremental test split issue (9 thread replies). Isabel O'Keefe checked in Jan 16 asking about keeping the weekly sync — no visible reply from Tom. Pulkit joined the channel Feb 24, 2026 but has NOT posted any outreach message. Ryan Barry (former CSM, departed Dec 20) was the primary relationship driver with consistent engagement through Dec 2025. Mia DyBuncio joined Dec 19 as part of the transition but no messages from her beyond joining. The channel shows a classic CSM handoff failure pattern — strong engagement under Ryan, complete silence after his departure.

email.analysis: Zero Gmail messages found for HAVN in the last 90 days. Searched both 'HAVN newer_than:30d' and 'HAVN newer_than:90d' plus 'from:tom@havnwear.com OR to:tom@havnwear.com' — all returned zero results. No email communication exists between Pulkit and HAVN whatsoever. The brand has been completely silent across all email channels.

granola.analysis: Granola query for 'HAVN meetings and discussions' returned no HAVN-specific meeting notes. The brand name does not appear in any Granola meeting transcripts from Oct 2025 through Apr 2026. This confirms HAVN has not been discussed in any recorded internal or external meetings during Pulkit's tenure as CSM.
